title: Marc Anthony Repairing Hair Mask, Repair Bond +Rescuplex - Repairs, Strengthens & Maintains Bonds within Hair - Eliminates Frizz, Flyaways & Reduce Breakage - Dry & Damaged Hair Professional Treatment
description:
About this item
Repair Bond +Rescuplex Hair Mask: Hair fiber is made up of bonds that give it strength, which can be damaged by things like hair color, daily styling, and pollution. As part of the Marc Anthony Repair Bond system, this Hair Mask infuses maximum hydration while protecting your hair from future damage, alleviating frizz, and boosting shine. For best results, use with the full Repair Bond +Rescuplex system of Shampoo, Conditioner, Leave-In Treatment and Mask. 8 oz.
Stay Strong: The Repair Bond system is formulated with Rescuplex, a complex developed to rebuild and maintain hair’s damaged bonds, including disulfide bonds. Designed with added ingredients like rice bran oil, rosemary oil, hydrolyzed quinoa and vitamin C, the Repair Bond +Rescuplex system is proven to result in hair that feels 111% stronger, 140% smoother and with 129% more shine.
How To Use: Apply to clean, wet hair after shampooing. Leave on for 3-5 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use 1-2 times per week. For best results, use with the full Repair Bond System: Shampoo, Conditioner and Leave-In Treatment. If using a conditioner, apply and rinse the mask before conditioning. Perfect for all hair types.
Endless Haircare Innovation: Marc Anthony’s team of style-makers and beauty lovers never sit still, traveling the world to bring you the best ingredients to create professional quality products. Repair Bond +Rescuplex is Vegan, Cruelty-Free, Paraben-Free, Sulfate-Free, and Phthalate-Free.
True Experts in Hair: Hair doesn’t need to be complicated. Marc Anthony’s mission is to make your hair play easy with premium, fool-proof products at an affordable price. All the styles. All the fun. We do what it takes to make hair play possible.

The angled tips are designed to tackle connectors located behind stubborn clips, while the straight tips excel in straight-pull applications. About this item
POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: Our small dehumidifier effectively absorbs up to 40oz excess moisture per day (Tested at 86°F, 80% RH), keeps the room humidity below 45% （The suitable humidity for the human body is 40%-60%）, Basement dehumidifier is effectively eliminate damp odor and improve human comfort. SLEEP WELL: Thanks to advanced semiconductor technology, in sleep mode, the small bathroom dehumidifier's noise level is as low as 30 decibels, which will not keep you awake at night, and the portable dehumidifier lights will automatically turn off.
OVERFLOW AUTO STOP PROTECTION: Our small room dehumidifier is designed with a smart auto stop function. When the water tank is full or positioned incorrectly, a home dehumidifier will automatically stop working to prevent water overflow. This feature ensures your safety and convenience, even when you're not at home. To reduce the frequency of emptying the water tank, we specially equipped the dehumidifier with a 95-ounce large-capacity water tank.
USER-FRIENDLY: Air dehumidifier for home has a simple design that sets up in seconds. just a couple of buttons to control power, lights, and quiet(sleep) mode. A quiet dehumidifier with a compact size of 13.78X7.95X6.22 inches, it can be seamlessly integrated into any space.

Friendly Reminder: A dehumidifier works by condensing moisture from the air, thereby reducing humidity levels. In practical use, the room's air exchange rate and external humidity can significantly affect the dehumidifier's performance. When using the dehumidifier, please keep doors and windows closed to reduce air circulation and ensure optimal dehumidifying effectiveness. Additionally, the dehumidifier's efficiency decreases in colder weather; it works best when the temperature is above 59°F (15°C).
